seoTitle: How to Appear Offline on ClickUp
metaDescription: Learn how to hide your active status on ClickUp using custom status text, muted notifications, and workspace visibility settings.
intro: ClickUp doesn't have a literal 'appear offline' toggle, but there are a few workarounds to manage how visible your activity is to teammates. This guide covers setting a custom status to signal you're unavailable, muting notifications so alerts don't pile up, and turning off the 'Who's Online' ClickApp at the workspace level to hide active presence indicators altogether.

steps.heading: Open your profile status
steps.body: Click your profile avatar and review your current presence indicator before making changes.

steps.heading: Set a custom status
steps.body: Click the 'Set Status' field below your profile name and type a custom presence message like 'Focusing' or 'Away', paired with a muted privacy emoji.

steps.heading: Mute notifications
steps.body: Check the 'Mute Notifications' box in the status panel to pause desktop, mobile, and email alerts while your status is active.

steps.heading: Set an expiration for your status
steps.body: Use the 'Remove Status After' setting so your profile automatically returns to normal after a set period.

steps.heading: Turn off Who's Online at the workspace level
steps.body: In Workspace Settings, disable the 'Who's Online' ClickApp to hide active presence columns entirely from the team directory.

steps.heading: Verify how you appear to teammates
steps.body: Check the team directory to confirm your profile shows the inactive indicator you intended.

faq.question: Does ClickUp have a true offline mode like some chat apps?
faq.answer: Not exactly; there's no single toggle for going invisible, but combining a custom status, muted notifications, and disabling the Who's Online ClickApp achieves a similar effect.

faq.question: Will muting notifications stop all alerts?
faq.answer: Muting pauses desktop, mobile, and email notification delivery while your custom status is active, though this depends on your exact settings.

faq.question: Can I set my status to automatically clear?
faq.answer: Yes, the 'Remove Status After' parameter lets you set a countdown so your profile automatically returns to its normal state.

faq.question: Does turning off Who's Online affect the whole workspace?
faq.answer: Yes, that setting is applied at the workspace level, so it changes how presence is displayed for everyone, not just your own account.
